title: Croatian Mushroom Stew
description: A rich and flavorful stew featuring a variety of mushrooms and duck fat, cooked to perfection in a clay pot. This ovo-vegetarian friendly dish is perfect for a cozy evening.

ingredients.name: mushrooms
ingredients.notes: mixed varieties such as cremini, shiitake, and button

instructions: Heat the duck fat in the clay pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saute until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and diced potatoes, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the vegetable broth, tomato paste, salt, and pepper, stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
